ddls:
CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address entry */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address string */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the address is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the address is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the address */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the address */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the address */,
  "accuracy_score" REAL /* Accuracy score of the geospatial data */,
  "accuracy_type" TEXT /* Type of accuracy measurement (e.g., rooftop, intersection) */,
  "number" TEXT /* House number of the address */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street name of the address */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the address is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the address */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the address data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the address was first added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the address was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the address (e.g., active, inactive, deprecated) */,
  "building_type" TEXT /* Type of building (e.g., residential, commercial, industrial) */,
  "floor_count" INTEGER /* Number of floors in the building */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_county FOREIGN KEY ("county") REFERENCES counties ("county_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_accuracy_type FOREIGN KEY ("accuracy_type") REFERENCES accuracy_types ("accuracy_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "county" TEXT /* County in which the city resides */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Common ZIP code associated with the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the city in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Name of the state capital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state in which the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* How often the source is updated */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data provided by the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accuracy_types" (
  "accuracy_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accuracy type */,
  "accuracy_name" TEXT /* Name of the accuracy type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the accuracy type */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Numerical representation of the confidence in the accuracy type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accuracy_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geo_coordinates" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geospatial entry */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related address */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the address */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the address */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the address in meters */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the geospatial data in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geo_coordinates_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update event */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the updated address */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "update_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_updates_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., urban planner, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the address being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the address was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
